heading: Budget justification for covered military unaccompanied housing Facilities Sustainment, Restoration, and Modernization projects
label: 227 Budget justification for covered military unaccompanied housing Facilities Sustainment, Restoration, and Modernization projects
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 227, added , , , directed Secretary of Defense to include recruiting costs in budget justification documents submitted to Congress each year in connection with submission of budget, prior to repeal by , , .Pub. amendments: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 227, added , , , directed Secretary of Defense to include recruiting costs in budget justification documents submitted to Congress each year in connection with submission of budget, prior to repeal by , , .Pub. L. 103–160, div. A, title III, § 374(a)107 Stat. 1636Pub. L. 104–106, div. A, title X, § 1061(f)(1)110 Stat. 443Nov. 30, 1993Feb. 10, 1996

children.text: for the fiscal year covered by the budget, the total requested expenditure for Facilities Sustainment, Restoration, and Modernization projects for covered military unaccompanied housing compared to the total expenditure required by such projects, disaggregated by military department; and

children.label: B
children.text: the type of facility repaired or restored under such repair projects;

children.label: C
children.text: the number of such repair projects that were for sustainment or repair of a facility; and

children.label: D
children.text: the number of such repair projects that were for restoration or modernization of a facility.
The term “covered military unaccompanied housing” has the meaning given in .section 2856 of this title
The terms “facility” and “military installation” have the meanings given, respectively, in .section 2801 of this title
The term “repair project” has the meaning given in .section 2811 of this title
